flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Molloy College rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.3k → $20.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Molloy College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.3k → $39.8k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Molloy College are 1% below 6-year earnings ($78.4k → $77.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Molloy College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
